title: MakeHuman Community MPFB2 / MakeClothes garment tooling candidate
permitted_uses: Record as a candidate source family for future license-compatible garment-source intake.
Use only as metadata for pipeline planning until specific garment assets have recorded source URL, license, author, redistribution permission, semantic key, and provenance hash.
claims_supported: MPFB2 / MakeHuman tooling is a candidate ecosystem for garment-source intake research.
Individual garment assets require per-asset license and redistribution review before materialization or commit.
claims_not_supported: This record does not allowlist any specific garment asset.
This record is not evidence of production asset readiness, Quest readiness, clinical validity, or scoring validity.
This record does not authorize redistribution of third-party MakeHuman garments.
